name: Cursor Brain
description: Use Cursor Agent as the AI brain for OpenClaw via MCP

cursorPath.description: Path to cursor agent binary. Leave empty to auto-detect.

outputFormat.description: Output format for cursor-agent. Auto-detected if not set. Use 'stream-json' for streaming + thinking blocks, 'json' for batch.

proxyPort.description: Port for the local streaming proxy (OpenAI-compatible). Default 18790.

requestTimeout.description: Per-request timeout in ms. Min 60000. Proxy reads from openclaw.json. Preserved on upgrade.

degradedTimeout.description: Timeout in ms when already degraded. Proxy reads from openclaw.json.

maxConsecutiveFailures.description: Consecutive failure threshold before proxy self-exits. Proxy reads from openclaw.json.

maxConsecutiveTimeouts.description: Consecutive timeout threshold before proxy self-exits. Proxy reads from openclaw.json.

streamResolveGraceMs.description: Grace period in ms after killing child before returning 503. Proxy reads from openclaw.json.

instantResult.description: Send batch results instantly. Proxy reads from openclaw.json.

forwardThinking.description: How to stream Cursor's thinking output. off: drop (not sent). reasoning_content: send in the reasoning_content field (OpenAI-style). content: send as normal content, markdown blockquote + "---" before reply (OpenClaw streaming cards). Proxy reads from openclaw.json.

streamSpeed.description: Chunked streaming chars/sec when instantResult is false. Proxy reads from openclaw.json.
